title: Ada Lovelace (ada-lovelace) · GitHub
snippet: Senior full-stack engineer building fast TypeScript and React products across frontend and backend systems, with strong performance work, data structures, storage systems, and design system ownership in London.

title: Grace Hopper (gracehopper) · GitHub

title: Linus Torvalds (linus) · GitHub
